Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mild hypoglycemia, elevated creatinine suggesting impaired renal function, low total protein and globulin, and mild metabolic acidosis (low CO₂). Lipid profile reveals hypercholesterolemia and elevated LDL. These findings may indicate chronic kidney disease with associated metabolic and nutritional disturbances. Clinical correlation and further nephrological and nutritional assessment are recommended.
